disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe eye pain that began while sanding wood with a power tool and no eye protection about 2 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was sanding a bit of wood and I didn't have any goggles on. It came on all of a sudden, maybe two hours ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Foreign-body / gritty sensation, like glass scraping the eye on every blink
trigger_question_examples: What does the eye feel like?
Does it feel like something is in it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It feels like there's a shard of glass or grit scraping across it every time I blink.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced/blurred vision in the affected eye since the injury
trigger_question_examples: How is your vision in that eye?
Can you see normally out of it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My vision on that side has gone blurry — I can't see properly out of it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked photophobia — bright light is intolerable, keeping the room lights off
trigger_question_examples: Can you tolerate the room lights?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Any light is agony — we've had to keep all the lights off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse reflex tearing and difficulty keeping the eye open (blepharospasm)
trigger_question_examples: Can you hold the eye open?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's streaming with tears and I just can't keep it open at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No nausea, vomiting, or coloured halos around lights
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel sick or are you vomiting?
Do you see rainbow-coloured rings around lights?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't feel sick and I'm not seeing any rings or halos — it's just the pain and the blur.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No preceding cold or flu symptoms; the other eye is unaffected and no household contacts have a red eye
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a cold or runny nose recently?
Is your other eye affected, or anyone else at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No cold or anything beforehand, the other eye is completely fine, and no one else here has a sore eye.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No visible blood in the eye and nothing obviously sticking out of it, as far as the patient can tell
trigger_question_examples: Can you see any blood pooling in the coloured part of the eye?
Is there anything obviously stuck in or poking out of the eye?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't really tell — it's watering too much and the light kills, but I don't think I can see blood in it.
